data.body: COMPLETE (2026-06-16). All ACs met: (1) MCP tool session lifecycle — stateless re-spawn validated (fresh MultiServerMCPClient per call; real stdio FastMCP server end-to-end test loads tools twice) AND a downed/zero-tools server raises a clean LLMRunnerError instead of silently yielding no tools (commit 4ac2e43d + tests); (2) Langfuse trace appears + flush() prevents loss — validated live in CI's langfuse-trace job (ephemeral self-hosted stack + GET /api/public/traces/{id} round-trip), which also fixed v4 trace-id capture + the _trace double-yield (shipped in 0.5.1); prompt->trace linkage is best-effort (run-level metadata, documented caveat that create_agent builds messages internally). (3) Both reachable via the test suites (Langfuse via -m external langfuse-trace job; MCP load tests in the [dev,agents] CI job). Closing.
